raw_text:
<think>
The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The values are provided: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-FB131957, blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers.

We need to output exactly three lines with those fields in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. No extra lines, no headings, no formatting beyond plain text.

Thus output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-FB131957
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

That's it.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-FB131957
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
